hooks.command: echo '[SessionStart:startup]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then kbx --help && kbx context && kbx me --json; else echo '[kbx not installed] Run: uv tool install "kbx[search]" && kbx index run'; fi

echo '[SessionStart:clear]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then kbx --help && kbx context && kbx me --json; else echo '[kbx not installed] Run: uv tool install "kbx[search]" && kbx index run'; fi
echo '[SessionStart:compact]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then kbx context && kbx me --json; else echo '[kbx not installed]'; fi
echo '[SessionStart:resume]'; if command -v kbx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'hook success: Success'; else echo '[kbx not installed]'; fi
